name: arcanea-design-system
title: Arcanean Design System (Cosmic)
description: The cosmic visual language — depth, glows, gold accents, glass surfaces, and restraint as the three principles of Arcanean UI.
author: Arcanea

files.content:
name: "Arcanean Design System (Cosmic)"
slug: "arcanea-design-system"
description: "The cosmic visual language — depth, glows, gold accents, glass surfaces, and restraint as the three principles of Arcanean UI."
version: "2.0.0"
category: "design"
author: "Arcanea"
license: "MIT"

tags:
  - "design"
  - "ui"
  - "ux"
  - "visual"
  - "theming"
  - "css"
  - "design-system"
  - "tokens"
  - "tailwind"

tool_compatibility:
  - "claude-code"
  - "opencode"
  - "cursor"

dependencies: []

install_commands:
  claude-code: "cp -r ~/.claude/skills/arcanea-design-system"
  opencode: "cp -r ~/.opencode/skills/arcanea-design-system"
  universal: "npx arcanea install arcanea-design-system"

usage_examples:
  - "User: style this button as Arcanean → AI: applies cosmic-surface background, gold-medium accent, depth glow"
  - "User: what's the cosmic-void color? → AI: returns #0b0e14 with usage guidance for deepest backgrounds"
  - "User: build an Atlantean academy card → AI: uses glass, atlantean-teal, glow-atlantean on hover"

homepage: "https://arcanea.ai/skills/arcanea-design-system"
repository: "https://github.com/frankxai/arcanea"
support: "https://github.com/frankxai/arcanea/issues"
